message.subject: FSA claim received
message.body_text: Your flexible spending claim was received. Reimbursements for claims received this cycle are processed by the end of the month. Submit any remaining receipts before the cycle closes.

deadlines: by the end of the month

message.subject: Consent form due back
message.body_text: The signed parental consent form is due back next Friday. Send a photo or scan of the form to the front office.

note: UK date order (day month year) is not matched by the date regex

message.subject: Consulate appointment
message.body_text: Your appointment at the consulate is scheduled for 14 July 2026 at 10:00. Bring your appointment letter and one form of photo identification.

note: month-day without a year is not matched

message.subject: Rent reminder
message.body_text: Quick reminder: rent is due June 5 as usual. The portal is back online if you want to pay early.

note: twelve true schedule dates: extractor caps at 10 so two tail dates are lost; schedule-noun is an action FP
ISO datetime with T suffix defeats the date regex word boundary

message.subject: Scheduled maintenance window
message.body_text: Maintenance window: our payment system will be unavailable from 2026-07-12T22:00 to 2026-07-13T02:00 UTC. Submit any payments before the window.

note: USD-prefixed amount and relative net-30 window are not matched

message.subject: Invoice INV-2026-0451
message.body_text: Invoice INV-2026-0451 from your contractor: total USD 2,450.00, payable within 30 days of the invoice date. Send payment by check or bank transfer.

note: spelled-out amount is not matched; date is

message.subject: Deposit due at signing
message.body_text: Per our agreement, the security deposit of one thousand two hundred dollars is due at lease signing on 07/15/2026.

note: euro amount is not matched; contact outside lexicon

message.subject: Hosting renewal invoice
message.body_text: Your hosting renewal invoice is ready: €89.00 due by 08/20/2026. Pay in euros or contact billing to switch currencies.

note: forwarded chain: forwarded header date is narrative; pay-no-attention is an action FP trap

message.subject: Fwd: Hydrant flushing
message.body_text:
FYI, forwarding the notice below.

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: City Water Department <service@citywater.example>
Date: June 10, 2026
Subject: Hydrant flushing

Hydrant flushing in your area is scheduled for June 24, 2026. Water may appear discolored; run cold taps until clear. Pay no attention to temporary pressure drops.

note: month-name ambiguity: May without a day, and may as a modal verb; clean negative

message.subject: Your May statement
message.body_text: Payment options may change next quarter. Your May 2026 statement is available. The balance shown may differ from your current balance.

note: date range: both endpoints are user-relevant

message.subject: Pool closure for resurfacing
message.body_text: The pool will be closed for resurfacing from 07/06/2026 through 07/19/2026. During this period, use the north facility. Schedule reserved lap lanes in the app.

note: single-decimal amount: regex captures $47 instead of $47.5 (partial-match double penalty)

message.subject: Final water bill
message.body_text: Your prorated final water bill is $47.5, due by 07/02/2026. Pay online to close out your account.

note: large comma-grouped amount in an escrow instruction

message.subject: Closing disbursement
message.body_text: The closing disbursement of $124,500 must clear escrow by August 3, 2026. Sign the wire authorization form today.

note: deadline lives in the subject line only

message.subject: Action required by 06/30/2026: benefits attestation
message.body_text: Complete your annual benefits attestation in the HR portal. The attestation takes about five minutes.

note: facts live only in the attachment text

message.subject: Invoice for this month
message.body_text: Please see the attached invoice for this month's services.
attachment_texts: Invoice #88123. Amount due: $530.00. Due date: 07/25/2026. Remit payment to Lakeview Consulting LLC.

note: same dollar string twice with different meanings collapses to one unique value

message.subject: Storage unit rent
message.body_text: Your monthly storage unit rent of $89 is due 07/01/2026. A late fee of $89 applies after 07/05/2026.

note: number-dense shipping noise: order ids, tracking numbers, and fraction-like tokens must not match

message.subject: Your order shipped
message.body_text: Order #20260712 shipped! Tracking: 1Z999AA10123456784. Your package weighs 12/16 lbs and contains 3 items.
